description: CompositionGrey round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton, with chest printFittingSlim Fit Wash care Machine wash/hand wash separately in mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring Dry in shade Medium iron Do not iron on print Full of fun, drama and emotion, this grey t-shirt from probase is replete with the energy of a rock star with feminine subtlty. Made of pure cottom fabric, it will keep you dry and comfortable through all seasons. You can pair this slim fit T-shirt with denims or cargos and flaunt your well toned muscles. Add on a pair of stylish sneakers from the wide collection available at myntra to complete that look.        Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-19"
